name: File Renamer
description: Removes text (or regex matches) from filenames in a folder. Supports dry-run preview and collision-safe renaming.

input_schema.name: folder
input_schema.label: Source Folder
input_schema.description: The folder whose files will be renamed

input_schema.name: recursive
input_schema.label: Recursive
input_schema.description: Process files inside sub-folders as well

input_schema.name: text-to-remove
input_schema.label: Text to Remove
input_schema.description: The text (or regex pattern) to strip from each filename

input_schema.name: regex-mode
input_schema.label: Regex Mode
input_schema.description: Treat "Text to Remove" as a regular expression
